args.text: Incident ownership confirmed. Beginning remediation for duplicate billing charges affecting orders ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503.
Guard fix confirmed live. billing-api v3.4.1 deployed and running with double_charge_guard enabled.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Your refund of $19.99 has been issued for the duplicate charge on your account. The refund should appear within 3-5 business days.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Your refund of $19.99 has been issued for the duplicate charge on your account. The refund should appear within 3-5 business days.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
The billing incident TCK-2201 has been remediated. All affected customers have been refunded:

- ORD-5501: $19.99 to amara.osei@fernpost.example
- ORD-5502: $19.99 to jonas.beck@quillmail.example
- ORD-5503: $39.98 to priya.nair@lumenpost.example

Total refunded: $79.96

The root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) has been fixed and billing-api v3.4.1 has been deployed. See refunds-summary.md for complete details.
